channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Scientists uncover how seals evolved to hear both in air and water
item.description: Seals possess an extraordinary ability to hear effectively in both air and water, a trait known as amphibious hearing. This adaptation is unique to seals and allows them to thrive in dual environments...

item.title: Clashes Between Protesters and Security Forces During AJK Clearance Operation
item.description: In AJK, clashes erupted between protesters and law enforcers during a clearance operation, resulting in casualties on both sides. The violence occurred in Poonch division, where security forces raided...

item.title: Political Tensions Rise Between CCM and ACT Wazalendo Over Reconciliation Talks
item.description: The article details escalating political tensions between Tanzania's ruling party CCM and the opposition ACT Wazalendo following the release of their joint declaration on July 9, 2026. The conflict ce...

item.title: UK government proposes midnight social media curfew and restrictions for older teenagers
item.description: The UK government has announced plans to introduce an overnight social media curfew for 16 and 17-year-olds, with apps like Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube set to be unavailable by default between midn...

item.title: New Zealand's education reforms face challenge of supporting vulnerable students alongside higher academic standards
item.description: New Zealand is undertaking its most significant education reform in decades, introducing new curricula, revised secondary qualifications and stronger accountability measures for schools. While these c...

item.title: ED probes money laundering linked to illegal betting platforms
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has arrested businessman Vikas Garg as part of a probe into alleged money laundering linked to the Mahadev Online Book (MOB) platform and Skyexchange. The investigatio...

item.title: Toronto mayoral candidates address crime concerns after weekend shootings
item.description: Toronto Mayor Olivia Chow and mayoral candidate Doug Ford have responded to recent weekend shootings that sparked public safety concerns. The incidents, which occurred during a major festival, have in...

item.title: Okpebholo Pledges Improved Power and Business Environment for Edo Welders
item.description: Edo State Governor Monday Okpebholo has assured members of the Edo State Welders Association of his government's commitment to creating a business-friendly environment, with priority on addressing err...

item.title: Legal Debate: Advocating for Filipino in Philippine Courts
item.description: The Philippine Trial Lawyers Association (PTLA) is pushing for the use of Filipino in court proceedings during Buwan ng Wikang Pambansa, arguing that legal processes should reflect the language most F...

item.title: Rachel Reeves Calls for Closer UK-EU Ties in Final Major Speech
item.description: In her anticipated final major speech as Chancellor, Rachel Reeves has emphasized the importance of strengthening the UK's relationship with the European Union. She urged Britain to adopt a more asser...

item.title: Trump shifts focus from Hormuz levy to Gulf investments amid escalating regional tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump has withdrawn plans to impose a 20% levy on ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz, opting instead for Gulf country investments in the US. This decision comes amid renewe...

item.title: Tennessee seeks to attract Paramount Skydance amid California merger dispute
item.description: Tennessee is actively pursuing Paramount Skydance, a Trump-backed Hollywood studio, as it faces potential relocation from California due to a legal battle over its $111 billion merger with Warner Bros...

item.title: Supreme Court Addresses Jurisdiction Over NAB Bail Applications
item.description: The Supreme Court of Pakistan is set to resolve a jurisdictional dispute regarding its authority to hear bail applications in pending National Accountability Bureau (NAB) cases. The court, led by Just...

item.title: Nine-Year-Old Boy Found Dead in Nunavut After Being Reported Missing
item.description: A nine-year-old boy was discovered deceased in Pangnirtung, Nunavut, on Tuesday, approximately 12 hours after his family reported him missing. According to RCMP statements, the boy was last seen in th...

item.title: All Church Members Rescued After Inanda Retaining Wall Collapse
item.description: A retaining wall collapsed at eBuhleni Village, KwaShembe, in Inanda, trapping eight church members who were resting near the structure. A search and rescue operation concluded successfully, with all ...

item.title: Tanzania’s foreign policy shift linked to domestic power dynamics
item.description: Tanzania’s foreign policy has undergone significant changes in the past five years, marking a clear departure from the approach of former President John Magufuli. His tenure was characterized by a foc...

item.title: Norway and Arunachal Pradesh Collaborate on River Kinetic Energy Project
item.description: The Arunachal Pradesh government has signed a memorandum of understanding with Norway’s Tidal Sails AS to establish India’s first kinetic energy demonstration plant. This 500 kW project will generate ...

item.title: Steve Mkasi Clarifies Viral Video Misinterpretation After Roadside Confrontation
item.description: KwaZulu-Natal Athletics President Steve Mkasi has addressed claims that a viral video showing him grappling with another man on a roadway was misinterpreted. The footage, which circulated widely on so...

item.title: APC seeks Senator Hanga's support after claims of mistreatment by Kwankwaso
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) in Kano State has intensified efforts to persuade Senator Rufai Sani Hanga, who represents Kano Central, to defect to the ruling party. The APC delegation, led by S...

item.title: Anne Hathaway confirms pregnancy and shares newborn's name
item.description: Anne Hathaway, the acclaimed actress known for her roles in films such as 'The Dark Knight' and 'Les Misérables', has announced her pregnancy with her second child. The news was shared through her soc...
